label: Culture
description: Defines a named culture that shapes an ideology's name generation, visual style preferences, and weapon class affinities.

pawnNameMaker.label: Pawn name maker
pawnNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate pawn names for this culture.

pawnNameMakerFemale.label: Pawn name maker (female)
pawnNameMakerFemale.description: RulePackDef used to generate female pawn names. Overrides pawnNameMaker for female pawns when present.

ideoNameMaker.label: Ideo name maker
ideoNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate ideology names for this culture.

deityNameMaker.label: Deity name maker
deityNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate deity names for this culture.

deityTypeMaker.label: Deity type maker
deityTypeMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate deity type labels (e.g. 'god', 'spirit') for this culture.

leaderTitleMaker.label: Leader title maker
leaderTitleMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate ideology leader titles for this culture.

festivalNameMaker.label: Festival name maker
festivalNameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate festival and ritual names for this culture.

thingStyleCategories.label: Thing style categories
thingStyleCategories.description: Weighted list of style categories that influence which visual theme is chosen for ideologies using this culture.

styleItemTags.label: Style item tags
styleItemTags.description: Weighted style item tags influencing hair, beard, and body decoration selection during pawn generation for this culture.

preferredWeaponClasses.label: Preferred weapon classes
preferredWeaponClasses.description: Noble and despised weapon class pair for this culture.

allowedPlaceTags.label: Allowed place tags
allowedPlaceTags.description: Origin tags (e.g. OriginTribal, OriginSpacer) that allow this culture to be assigned during world generation. Not translated.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the culture icon.

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.description: RGBA tint applied to the culture icon. Defaults to white (no tint).
